title: rubus hirtus subsp. pierratii
intro: Rubus hirtus subsp. pierratii, also known as the French bramble or pierrat's raspberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus hirtus plant, a type of bramble native to Europe. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus subsp. pierratii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. Rubus hirtus subsp. pierratii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and utilize its health benefits.
